headline: Microchip Technology (MCHP) Stock After 43% YTD Gain Is The Price Still Justified
summary: If you are wondering whether Microchip Technology is priced fairly today or not, looking closely at how the stock is valued is a good place to start. The share price recently closed at US$93.26, with returns of 43.4% year to date and 36.0% over the last year, which hints that expectations and perceived risk around the stock may have shifted. Recent coverage has focused on Microchip Technology in the context of its role in the semiconductor sector and how investors are reassessing chip...
